behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path, constant name, value, type, required strings ('exceeds the maximum allowed'), FieldViolation::new("signatures"), ErrorReason::FieldInvalid, and request.signatures.len().

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies nearly all implementation details: constant name, value, type, exact API calls (FieldViolation::new("signatures"), ErrorReason::FieldInvalid), required phrase, and the comparison expression request.signatures.len().

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for presence of required tokens/strings that the instruction explicitly mandates; alternative correct implementations following instructions would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The f2p tests (test_signature_limit_constant_exists, test_signature_validation_code_exists, test_validation_occurs_before_signature_parsing, test_error_is_invalid_argument, test_code_has_proper_documentation) are all string/regex checks on the file; no test invokes the gRPC endpoint or asserts runtime rejection behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning default cannot pass since tests require specific strings and ordering of validation before parsing in the file.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover constant, validation logic, ordering, error types, comment, and compile/fmt checks as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test function has a descriptive name and docstring labeling fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact file crates/sui-rpc-api/src/grpc/v2/transaction_execution_service/mod.rs and dictates the precise expression request.signatures.len() > MAX_NUMBER_OF_SIGNATURES, removing localization effort.
